candidate_lesson: When 30-indicator conviction is 100% but green_matches is 0 and hist_hr is 0%, the consensus is a live-only phantom with no historical analog and must be sized to zero, not full conviction.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.0  # freeze, treat as UNRELIABLE
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
